evidence: Reviewed src/contexts/agent_execution/model.rs:241-246 and src/adapters/stub_backend.rs:449-454; TokenCounts now carries cache_read_tokens/cache_creation_tokens and all concrete struct literals in the touched backends were updated.

Reviewed src/adapters/process_backend.rs:181-197 and src/adapters/process_backend.rs:1289-1327; Claude usage now maps into TokenCounts, Codex NDJSON parsing restores input/output/cached tokens, and the round-2 overflow/null guards are correct.

Reviewed src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:299-312 and src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:240-257; OpenRouter now forwards Anthropic/OpenAI cache fields into TokenCounts and tracing::info! is emitted before fallible post-processing.
Validation passed with cargo test --quiet (330 lib tests, 128 cli tests, 1 run_attach_tmux test, 667 unit tests; 0 failures), cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings, and cargo fmt --check.
findings_or_gaps: Coverage gap: src/adapters/process_backend.rs:181-197 builds Claude TokenCounts from envelope.usage, but the added tests at src/adapters/process_backend.rs:2664-2704 only deserialize ClaudeEnvelope/ClaudeUsage. The existing invoke-level Claude test at tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs:430-461 still uses an envelope without usage, so a regression in the TokenCounts wiring would not be caught.

Coverage gap: src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:299-312 is the actual cache-token mapping, but the added tests at src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:1151-1192 stop at OpenRouterUsage deserialization. The invoke-level test at src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:721-753 still only asserts prompt/completion/total, so neither Anthropic cache fields nor prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens are verified through the adapter output.

Coverage gap: the new structured trace at src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:240-257 is not exercised by the service test suite; tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs:200-227 verifies invoke metadata persistence, but not that the info event is emitted with the required token/cache fields or that it still fires before raw-output or contract-validation failures.
follow_up_or_amendments: Add a ProcessBackendAdapter invoke test that feeds a Claude envelope with usage and asserts envelope.metadata.token_counts.prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, cache_read_tokens, and cache_creation_tokens.

Add OpenRouter invoke tests for both usage shapes: one response with cache_read_input_tokens/cache_creation_input_tokens and one with prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens, each asserting the resulting envelope.metadata.token_counts fields.

Add an AgentExecutionService tracing test that captures the "invocation completed" event and asserts the required fields, including the early-emission behavior before downstream parse or contract failures if that behavior is intentional.
